sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10033" key="a)ntikli/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντικλίνω</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">[ῑ]</foreign>, <sense id="n10033.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">turn</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bend again,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0576.tlg001:107" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Musae.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">107</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
